description: The Aryan Circle is a white supremacist neo-Nazi prison gang operating in the United States, founded in 1985 by Mark 'Cowboy' Gaspard in the Texas Department of Corrections as a splinter group from the Aryan Brotherhood of Texas. It is the second-largest prison gang in Texas, with members involved in drug trafficking, murder, and extortion. The gang remains active in state and federal prisons.
